name: Breakfast Burrito
steps: Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy. Remove and chop.
Whisk eggs, melt butter in the same skillet, and scramble eggs over medium heat.
Warm tortillas in microwave for 15 seconds.
Fill each tortilla with eggs, bacon, cheese, sliced avocado, and salsa.
Fold and roll into burritos. Optional: toast seam-side down in a dry pan for 1 minute.
notes: Meal prep: wrap in foil and freeze. Reheat in microwave 2-3 min.
